"D:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\min_repro.dir/objects.a
D:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\min_repro.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\min_repro.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\G__~1.EXE -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\min_repro.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o min_repro.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmin_repro.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\min_repro.dir\linklibs.rsp
